case_title: LING HU VS. PANIZ KARIMPOUR ET AL

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74044224) FILED BY DEFENDANT KARIMPOUR, PANIZ KARIMPOUR, MOHAMMAD
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-25-2024. THE OCT-30-2024 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210077463) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HU, LING
ARBITRATOR PHILIP ALLAN SEGAL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-25-2024 THROUGH FEB-23-2025.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210077463) TO PLAINTIFF HU, LING
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-28-2024 CONTINUED TO OCT-30-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 76334486) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HU, LING AS TO DEFENDANT KARIMPOUR, PANIZ

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210077463) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HU, LING AS TO DEFENDANT KARIMPOUR, PANIZ KARIMPOUR, MOHAMMAD DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-28-2024 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-24-2024 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-05-2024

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HU, LING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARIMPOUR, PANIZ $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, ; CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AGAINST MOHAMMAD KARIMPOUR IS DENIED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
